tasks.label: ADB Reverse 4000 (Android)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $lines = adb devices | Select-Object -Skip 1; foreach ($line in $lines) { if ($line -match '^(\S+)\s+device$') { $id = $Matches[1]; adb -s $id reverse tcp:4000 tcp:4000 | Out-Null; Write-Host "[$id]"; adb -s $id reverse --list } }; exit 0
